branch: new2fly master fcee013; new-api feat/creative-embed 1680c112; opentu feat/creative-embed f35a831
commandsRun: find/rg dist scans for *.map, stats.html, sourceMappingURL, build path/module graph markers
diff/tree-hash checks for opentu/dist/apps/web and both new-api embedded dist trees
focused nl/rg reads for header safety, task submit non-OK handling, S3 timeout, video content fail-closed, CI workflow wiring
evidence: 三份目标 dist 一致：opentu/dist/apps/web、new-api/web/creative/dist、new-api/router/web/creative/dist 均为 174 files / 16144344 bytes / tree_sha256=14f0600432ea05f07502c4b0dceeac4102b01746b1c1537bbec8526f33fea575。
new2fly release gate 通过：输出包含 `[ok] Creative embedded artifact contract holds`、`[policy] no generated sourcemaps found`、`[check] embedded dist text hygiene holds`。
版本 provenance 具体且一致：三份 version.json 均为 version=0.9.6, gitCommit=f35a83102273bfa45c4e399639b2e4a0c2c9fc92；该 commit 在 opentu 当前仓库存在。

header 变体防护：relay/common/override.go:1236-1263 对 copy/move source 和 target 复用 denylist；override.go:1288-1307 覆盖 selected/request/upstream key、websocket、secret/api key 变体；override_test.go:1640-1744 覆盖回归用例。
task submit 非 OK 上游响应：relay/relay_task.go:226-269 丢弃并关闭 body，只返回状态码错误；relay/relay_task_test.go:38-54 覆盖不暴露原始上游 body。
Creative S3 timeout：service/creative_asset.go:782-790 克隆 HTTP client 并设置默认/自定义有限 timeout；service/creative_asset_test.go:156-181 覆盖默认 30s 和自定义 45s。
视频 content fail-closed：controller/creative.go:730-735 设置 Creative video context；video_proxy.go:74-95 owner-scope 查询并在非视频平台前置 404；creative_test.go:1451-1507 覆盖 owner scope 和 same-user non-video。
inconclusive: new-api gate 的 Go tests/build 未能在当前只读沙箱执行：`go: creating work dir: mkdir /tmp/go-build...: read-only file system`。脚本内容已审计，但运行时测试结果未验证。

nonBlockingRisks.evidence: 三个仓库均有未提交改动；dist version.json 指向 opentu HEAD f35a831，但当前工作树还有未提交源/ops/gate 改动。用户规则下这是 release reproducibility risk，不作为代码行为 blocker。
nonBlockingRisks.mitigation: 提交或形成可复现补丁后重新运行 new2fly gate 和 new-api CI gate。
nonBlockingRisks.title: Dirty worktrees make provenance incomplete until commit

nonBlockingRisks.evidence: ops/newapi-opentu-production/README.md:19 对 new2fly ops/runbook 仍写着 `record the commit SHA after this runbook is committed`。
nonBlockingRisks.mitigation: 提交 runbook/gate 后补入最终 new2fly commit 或在发布记录中记录该 SHA。
nonBlockingRisks.title: Runbook provenance for orchestration repo is intentionally pending commit

summary: 当前磁盘复审未发现新的 blocking defect。生成 dist、debug artifact/provenance、new2fly release gate、new-api CI wiring、runbook/smoke timeout/TLS 文档，以及最近修复点的源码与测试覆盖均符合目标；唯一未验证项是只读沙箱无法运行 Go 测试阶段。
